title: Sword Blocking Re-added
description: Re-adds the sword blocking animation upon right clicking. This recource pack is purely cosmetic and doesn't block any damage like sword blocking did before 1.9.
body: Simply a resource pack made to add the animation of sword blocking from before the combat update to modern Minecraft. The pack is cosmetic only so it doesn't actually block any incoming damage, but it's cool anyway if you like to spam the animation. It may not work with other resource packs which mess with item models.
